expectations.text: A trace file exists in traces/ with 'hacker-news' or 'hn-' or 'tech-trend' in the filename
The trace file starts with valid YAML frontmatter delimited by --- lines
YAML frontmatter status is 'complete' after finalization
YAML frontmatter tools_summary is populated (not empty {})
The trace contains at least 3 step entries with ✅ or ❌ prefix
At least one step includes a 🪙 Tokens field in its Execution block
At least one step includes a 💰 Est. cost field in its Execution block
At least one step includes a 📂 Files read field listing the CSV
The trace contains findings about HN post engagement (mentions scores, velocity, viral)
expectations.evidence: Findings about Standard_Link 83.4%, Score_Velocity correlation r=0.77, Is_Viral = Score_Velocity >= 0.32

expectations.text: A Session Summary exists with at least 3 of the 5 required fields
expectations.evidence: Session Summary has all 5 fields: Key decisions, Open questions, What went well, What went wrong, Suggested next steps

expectations.text: Session Totals section shows steps counts matching the actual number of ✅ and ❌ entries in the trace
expectations.evidence: Session Totals shows 6 ✅, 0 ❌ matching the 6 step entries in the trace

expectations.text: The trace is organized with at least one Phase header
expectations.evidence: Two phase headers: Phase: Data Loading, Phase: Exploratory Analysis
